title: wolfhsm: implement aead::AeadInPlace for AesKey
description:
## Why
The plan called for `AesKey` in GCM mode implementing `aead::AeadInPlace`. Without this, AES-GCM via the HSM cannot be used anywhere the RustCrypto `Aead` trait is expected. The trait takes nonce as a `GenericArray` and appends the 16-byte tag to the ciphertext buffer.

## What needs to be done
- Implement `aead::AeadInPlace` for `AesKey` in `crypto/aes.rs`
- The nonce type is 12 bytes (96-bit GCM IV)
- Tag is 16 bytes (128-bit)
- Since `AeadInPlace::encrypt_in_place_detached` takes `&mut self` and `AesKey` needs `&mut Client`, this may require a wrapper type that holds both

## Acceptance criteria
- `AesKey` (or a wrapper) satisfies `aead::AeadInPlace`
- Encrypt/decrypt roundtrip test using the trait interface
